home.heroFooter: Specializing in <0>React & Modern Frontend</0> and <0>UI/UX Engineering</0>. Crafting digital experiences where <1>high performance</1> meets <2>refined aesthetics</2>.

about.subtitle: Software Developer & UI/UX Engineer.
about.bioParagraph1: I am a Software Developer who believes that the browser is the most powerful canvas for solving modern product challenges. My foundation spans strict engineering logic, systems thinking, and a genuine obsession with performance, accessibility, and visual craft.
about.bioParagraph2: I bridge the gap between strict engineering rigor and creative, high-performance UI/UX. From architecting polymorphic design systems with token-driven theming to building pixel-perfect interactions with React 19 and Tailwind v4 — I treat the browser as my canvas and performance as a first-class feature, not an afterthought.

comp.aiDesc: React 19, Tailwind v4, Framer Motion, Vite
comp.toolsDesc: Design Systems, Polymorphic Theming, Glassmorphism, Canvas/WebGL
comp.intlDesc: Work and Travel (TN, USA) — English Proficiency

projects.subtitle: Engineered Solutions & Interactive Experiences
projects.hangmanDesc: Classic hangman game implemented with vanilla JS and CSS animations. Contains responsive layout, keyboard support, and simple state management for rounds and scoring.
projects.todolistDesc: Lightweight todo app using Local Storage for persistence, optimistic UI updates and accessible form controls. Includes filtering, sorting and small animations for better UX.
projects.examDesc: A validation-first exam interface with real-time answer checking, localized strings, keyboard navigation and progress persistence. Focused on minimal latency and clear feedback for users.
projects.flightTrackerDesc: Built with React and Leaflet to display live flight positions, custom clustered markers and performant map interactions. Includes API retry/caching, accessibility labels for map controls and mobile-friendly gestures.
projects.multiplicationManiaDesc: An interactive multiplication learning game with various modes including flashcards, sequential tests, and a time-based challenge system.
